creator: erik@tenku.dk
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #17)
For the diff between the old devel/root port and my new submission, I checked out commit with hash a3abb0daa65f7f6d8d3eab385fd377edf8a43ef3, which is the very last commit containing devel/root -- in the subsequent commit with hash 74a1fea448afef47f7da88ef8f4ce6ebf5972af8 devel/root is removed.

Attaching shar archive of devel/root below this comment.
